case_title: CURTIS BERNARD VS. YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (CERTIFIED MAIL NOT SIGNED FOR BY THE NAMED PERSON: BENSON YOUNG) SERVED MAY-24-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BERNARD, CURTIS AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNARD, CURTIS AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON CLAIM BY PERSONAL SERVICE. DATE OF SERVICE 7-26-16. FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CURTIS BERNARD AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE NORMAN YOUNG, MANAGER AT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNARD, CURTIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-19-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNARD, CURTIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG'S DISCOUNT MUFFLER & BRAKE, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
